intro:
pata nahi kaise start karu…
bas itna hai ki tuje happy birthday bolna hai

memories.label: Habit
memories.content:
There are a thousand reason to not trust you 
But I m believing the one that trusts you

memories.label: inspiration
memories.content: Today I was asked 'what Inspired me last week' altough I told them I was inspired by a language But deepdown I was more inspired by You I was inspired by you trusting me even without me Being able to trust you very well

memories.label: are you real?
memories.content:
Sometimes u feel too good to be true
But I have met u in person, u are true , it's insane , wow

memories.label: apologies and thankfullness
memories.content:
Sorry for each time I made you feel bad 
 And sorry for not making you feel heard 
 Sorry for letting you get bored 
 And thanks for choosing me
  Thanks for choosing me each time

memories.label: Voice
memories.content: your voice , you once said you dont like it , how you can't it's so cute and i just love it

memories.label: Balance
memories.content: you reassures me always , you calms me down , you makes me feel better always

memories.label: Future
memories.content: Hope we`ll be togeather each year until our years come to an end

memories.label: just what you want
memories.content: mai jaisa hu tuje waisa hi pasand hu , it's just what a man wants , but i m trying to chagne  myself for you always

memories.label: belive
memories.content: even i didn't belived in me , but you did

memories.label: finally 19
memories.content: just one more year to reach 20 , wow , yr mai tere se chota hu , nahi hu wasai pr hu yr

constellation.content: you were always the one for me
you once said "Like haa pasand hai maire ko ,my love language is kiss I guess"

final:
bas… ye sab bolna tha.
bina reason ke nahi likha hai.
